_comment: Example companion configuration for the Lylo Companion master template. Placeholder / template values only — identity fields (name, persona tone, speaking style, voice id) are intentionally left blank. A copied instance's real configuration is created during Setup Mode and stored in the companion_profile database table. This file is a shape reference and a Setup seed; it is never a runtime source. Validates against companion.schema.json in template mode. Never commit real client values to the master template.
